title: Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed
description: More details about armor in the armor bar!
body:
# Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed


**Show more details of armors in your armor bar!**

Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed is a maintained fork of the popular Detail Armor Bar mod, bringing enhanced armor visualization to Minecraft 1.21.5+. This client-side mod provides detailed information about your armor directly in the HUD, making it easier to manage your protection and enchantments.

## ✨ Features
- Netherite Armor Bar
- Enchant Protection Type Color Effect
- Armor Mending Effect
- Thorns Overlay / Effect
- Armor's Low Durability Warn Effect
- Armor Trim Display
- And more!

## 📖 **About This Fork**
Detail Armor Bar Reconstructed is maintained by [coredex-source](https://github.com/coredex-source) and continues the legacy of RedLime's original mod. This fork aims to make all of the features of the orignal mod be fully implemented to newer Minecraft versions and to extend the mod functionality in the future.


## 💳 Credits
- **RedLime**: Original mod creator
- **ram6ert**: 1.21.5 fork contributor
- **snessim & Heamaci**: Texture contributors
- **Icedude907** for contributing to the code by fixing a visual bug.
- **axtrough** for adding copper armor textures.

## ⚡ Version Support

- The mod will be supported for upto 3 versions, for example if 1.21.7 is the latest Minecraft release then support will be provided for 1.21.5, 1.21.6 and 1.21.7.
- If a backport is to be requested, it can be requested be creating an issue [here](https://github.com/coredex-source/DetailArmorBarReconstructed/issues).

## 🔗 **Links**
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/coredex-source/DetailArmorBarReconstructed)
- **Original Mod**: [RedLime's Detail Armor Bar](https://github.com/redlime/DetailArmorBar)

---


**Note**: For Minecraft 1.21.4 and below, please use the [original Detail Armor Bar mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar). (Due to popularity of 1.21.1 for modding I have decided to add support for those versions in 5.0.0)
